issues.sample: BMW'S LANE DEPARTURE SYSTEM ACTUALLY PULLS THE CAR'S STEERING LEFT OR RIGHT, AND COULD CAUSE THE CAR TO COLLIDE WITH ANOTHER VEHICLE OR RUN OFF THE ROAD. I EXPERIENCED THIS WHILE DRIVING ON THE FREEWAY IN SOUTHERN CALIFORNIA.  THE LANE DEPARTURE SYSTEM ALMOST PULLED MY VEHICLE IN

WAS IN A DRIVE THRU ON 9/6/2020 WAITING OUR TURN.  APPROX. 7 CARS IN FRONT OF US.  AS WE ARE SLOWLY MOVING UP TO ORDER, CAR IN IDLE, FOOT ON BRAKE.  AS WE ARE MOVING FORWARD, WHEN WE WERE UP TO 3 CARS,  STILL IDLING AND FOOT ON BRAKE, THE CAR HAD FULLY ACCELERATED, BRAKE NOT HOLD

Engine starter safety recall came out in September 2025, with no remedy or parts existing for fixing it. 5 months later, and no timeframe is provided for a remedy. This is a major fire risk given the amount of rain now that could corrode the starter and lead to a fire.

DON'T KNOW WHAT IS CAUSING IT. THERE IS MAJOR SQUEAKING/WHINING/GRINDING NOISE  IF EVEN A TINY BIT OF WATER GETS IN THERE AND LAST COUPLE DAYS AFTER THAT. AND WHEN YOU TURN THE STEERING WHEEL TO THE LEFT THE SQUEAKING/WHINING GETS LOUDER. AND WHEN DOES DO THIS THE SUSPENSION IF Y

narrative.headline: What 2020 Bmw Z4 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 4 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Steering (50% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
